creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please update attachment 153636 to include the updating of the patch files in files/ via make makepatch, rather than as individual diffs.

A single svn diff will suffice to include changes to patch files. If the filenames need changing, just svn delete the old, make makepatch the new, then svn add to add them to files. Then svn diff away and attach :)

Thanks!
